flavourText: This decimal just keeps going and going. Show it who is boss by converting it to a fraction!
Armed with exponents and enormous numbers, this boss thinks they are untouchable. Prove that even the biggest numbers have rules!
They cannot be written as a neat fraction and they are proud of it. Simplify them down to size!
Hiding behind layers of brackets and like terms. Expand, simplify and factorise your way to victory!
Everything must stay perfectly balanced. Whatever you do to one side, you had better do to the other!
Rising and falling in a perfect curve, this boss always has two solutions up their sleeve. Can you find them both?
Plotting their next move on a grid of infinite possibilities. Track their gradient and intercept their plans!
They follow a pattern, but can you crack it? Find the nth term and predict their every move!
Sharing is caring, but only if you share in the right ratio. Get the parts right and this boss crumbles!
Armed with a protractor and a love of parallel lines, this boss demands you give reasons for every answer!
Translating, rotating, reflecting and enlarging at will. Describe their transformation fully to defeat them!
Ruling over 2D and 3D realms alike. Calculate every surface and fill every volume to bring them down!
Lurking in right-angled triangles, always opposite the right angle. Use SOH CAH TOA to track them down!
Spinning through cyclic quadrilaterals and tangent lines. Master the circle theorems and break the cycle!
Moving with both magnitude and direction, this boss can prove any two points are collinear. Can you keep up?
Nothing is certain except that you will need a tree diagram. Branch out and beat the odds!
Crunching data and plotting graphs at lightning speed. Find the averages and spread to outsmart them!
Guarding the upper and lower bounds of every measurement. Get your accuracy right to slip past them!
Two equations, two unknowns, one boss to beat. Eliminate or substitute your way to the answer!
Feeding outputs back in as inputs, getting closer and closer to the answer. Iterate until you converge on victory!
